title: Bottles and Buckets to Beer Jugs
description: Turns bottles and buckets in to jugs, and turns honey into beer.
body:
Hello! This is my first resource pack :)

# QnA:
**Does this work only on 1.x.x?**\
This pack can work on earlier versoins (later versions will not have new items retextured if there are any), as long as they are compatable with resource packs.

**Does this give you an advantage during pvp?**\
No, it actually gives you a disadvantage, as the jugs are a lot harder to tell apart. This pack is only meant for use as a joke.

**Do you drink beer in real life?**\
No.

**Why are my bees producing beer?**\
...bee-r?

**~~that wasnt funny~~**\
shh thats not a question
